name: raycast-trading
title: Raycast Trading
description: A Raycast extension for market overview, watchlists, quote lookup, and API call inspection.
author: linbudu599

preferences.name: language
preferences.title: Language
preferences.description: Choose the display language for the extension.

preferences.name: changeColorStyle
preferences.title: Change Color Style
preferences.description: Choose how market gains and losses are highlighted.

commands.name: display-markets
commands.title: Market Overview
commands.description: Monitor major global market indexes and cross-asset indicators.

preferences.name: showTradingOnly
preferences.title: Show Active Markets Only
preferences.label: Only show markets that are currently trading
preferences.description: Hide closed market sections from the market overview.

commands.name: display-watchlist
commands.title: Watchlist
commands.description: Track real-time quotes for your saved symbols.

commands.name: search-stock
commands.title: Quote Lookup
commands.description: Look up real-time quotes and reference data by symbol.

commands.name: configure-watchlist
commands.title: Manage Watchlist
commands.description: Add, remove, and reorder symbols in your watchlist.

commands.name: show-api-call
commands.title: API Call Log
commands.description: Review persisted Longbridge API request and response logs.
